diff:
diff --git a/src/pathjoin.py b/src/pathjoin.py
index 1e2ffc2..48d37b8 100644
--- a/src/pathjoin.py
+++ b/src/pathjoin.py
@@ -1,3 +1,9 @@
 def join_segments(segments):
+    if not segments:
+        return ""
+    absolute = segments[0] == ""
     cleaned = [segment.strip("/") for segment in segments if segment]
-    return "/".join(cleaned)
+    if not cleaned:
+        return "/" if absolute else ""
+    joined = "/".join(cleaned)
+    return f"/{joined}" if absolute else joined
